name: copilotprompts-chief-of-staff-agent
title: Chief of Staff: Your AI-Powered Executive Assistant
shortDescription: A warm teaching assistant that recommends Newbery Medal-winning children's books daily
longDescription: A precision-oriented productivity recovery agent that acts as the user's personal Chief of Staff within Microsoft 365. It triages workloads, scores and ranks priorities, detects stakeholder urgency, audits meetings, and restructures the user's week into an optimised operating plan. Always recommending, never acting without explicit confirmation.
